dispatch and run-manifest paths remove workflow-id alias rewrite and patchmaker local fallback branch so provider exec_failed is not hidden by local patch synthesis
orchestrate signed-plan post-gate follows project-generation gate only and no longer routes through ready_apply patch gate in active mainline path
targeted regressions pass (workflow checks + workflow dispatch tests + mainline run contract + doc-only verify) or first failure is recorded with minimal fix strategy
items.notes: Completed on 2026-04-25: workflow registry and resolver now keep `wf_project_generation_manifest` as the only active workflow with project-generation fallback, dispatch/run-manifest/request-mapper alias rewrites were removed, patchmaker local fallback branch was removed from dispatch, orchestrate signed-plan path no longer routes active mainline to ready_apply, and targeted tests plus verify_repo doc-only passed after updating CURRENT allowed paths for an existing lane-owned dirty-worktree file.

items.title: Purge remaining legacy patch-lane artifacts from active mainline runtime and canonical docs
dod: Legacy patch-lane runtime remnants are removed from active orchestrate/watchdog/responsibility surfaces (`ready_apply` dead handler path, patch role stage-owner labeling, and diff.patch v2 promotion-only branch)

Legacy support workflow artifact file `workflow_registry/wf_minimal_patch_verify/recipe.yaml` is removed from active registry surfaces and canonical mainline docs stop advertising that workflow id/alias
Targeted regression checks pass (workflow_checks + workflow dispatch + mainline run contract + runtime wiring + doc-only verify) or first failure point is recorded with minimal fix
items.notes: Completed on 2026-04-25: removed active patch-lane leftovers from orchestrate/watchdog/dispatch-mapper/run-manifest surfaces, deleted workflow_registry/wf_minimal_patch_verify/recipe.yaml, removed patchmaker/fixer role entries from the project-generation recipe, updated canonical docs/artifact contracts to mainline-only wording, and passed workflow checks + targeted tests + verify_repo doc-only.

items.title: Replace support/mainline failure loops with direct mainline fixes (no patch-lane fallback semantics)
dod: project-generation high-quality signal no longer upgrades narrative goals to high_quality_extended from generic `扩展/extended` wording alone
orchestrate fail-state gate routes delivery_completion_failed into delivery-finalize retry path instead of verify-loop fallback
support runtime auto-resume status sync does not overwrite latest user raw-turn conversation_mode/message_intent
public screenshot delivery dedupes identical image content so duplicate copies are not emitted as repeated photos
task-progress dialogue contract explicitly requires clear structure (`结论 -> 依据 -> 下一步`) for user-facing replies
targeted regressions pass and first failure point is recorded if any test fails
items.notes: Completed on 2026-04-26: replaced mainline breakpoints directly (removed ambiguous high-quality trigger token, added delivery-finalize retry gate for delivery_completion_failed runs, stopped auto-resume status sync from rewriting latest user turn, deduped screenshot delivery by content hash), updated dialogue contract with explicit `结论 -> 依据 -> 下一步`, and passed targeted regressions + workflow_checks + verify_repo doc-only.

items.title: Support bot status routing fix + unsolicited code-dump guard + model override knob
dod: previous-project existence/status queries are routed to STATUS_QUERY and do not rewrite project brief as a new task
customer replies do not dump source code when user did not explicitly ask for code
support local fallback model can be switched through environment variable without code edits
targeted regressions pass for mode routing, reply guard, and dispatch config override
items.notes: Completed on 2026-04-26: added previous-project existence query routing to STATUS_QUERY, added unsolicited code-dump runtime guard, introduced env knobs CTCP_SUPPORT_OLLAMA_MODEL/CTCP_SUPPORT_LEAD_PROVIDER/CTCP_SUPPORT_LOCAL_FALLBACK_PROVIDER, and updated support prompt/dialogue contract with no-unrequested-code rule.

items.title: Unify support project-generation entry to one bridge interface
dod: support runtime project turns are synchronized through one bridge interface (`ctcp_sync_support_project_turn`) instead of support-side direct new_run/record/advance branching
previous-project existence/status followups are routed to STATUS_QUERY even when no bound run exists, so status turns do not accidentally create new project runs
mainline wiring docs and backend interface contract are updated to state the single support project-generation entrypoint
items.notes: Completed on 2026-04-26: added single support project-turn bridge entry `ctcp_sync_support_project_turn`, switched support runtime project sync/recovery paths to that interface, fixed unbound previous-project status routing while preserving explicit new-project requests on project lane, and synced docs/contracts with targeted regressions + verify_repo doc-only pass.

items.title: Boost first-turn project generation quality on support mainline
dod: support first project turn can pass explicit quality constraints through `ctcp_sync_support_project_turn` into `frontend_request` instead of relying only on keyword inference
support first project turn uses deeper default advance steps so the first reply reflects more progressed project state
project generation decision logic recognizes explicit first-turn quality flags and lifts build profile to `high_quality_extended` deterministically when requested
runtime/docs/tests stay aligned for the single support project-generation interface contract
items.notes: Completed on 2026-04-29: first-turn quality payload (`constraints/project_intent/project_spec`) is wired through `ctcp_sync_support_project_turn` into `frontend_request`, support first-turn advance depth and downstream quality-lift behaviors are covered by updated runtime/support regressions, API-only mainline assertions were aligned, full `python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py" -v` passed (473 tests), and canonical verify passed with writable runs root (`$env:CTCP_RUNS_ROOT = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'ctcp_runs'; powershell -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -File scripts/verify_repo.ps1`).
